main_product.title: HevraCom Waterproof Wet Bag for Gym Clothes, Swimsuits and Shoes, Odor-Resistant Travel Laundry Bag, Black, 14 x 17.5 in

details.title: HevraCom Waterproof Wet Bag for Gym Clothes, Swimsuits and Shoes, Odor-Resistant Travel Laundry Bag, Black, 14 x 17.5 in
details.description:
• Waterproof Wet Bag for Active Use: Designed to help separate wet, damp, or odor-prone items from clean belongings, this waterproof wet bag is ideal for gym clothes, swimsuits, towels, shoes, toiletries, and travel essentials.
  • Odor-Resistant Laundry Bag Design: Helps contain odors from used workout clothes, swimwear, socks, and other worn items, making it a practical odor-resistant laundry bag for gym visits, pool days, travel, hiking, camping, and daily organization.
  • Durable YKK Zipper Closure: Built with a high-quality YKK zipper that supports secure closure and long-term daily use, helping keep contents protected while reducing the risk of spills, leaks, or loose items inside a backpack, suitcase, or gym bag.
  • Compact 14 x 17.5 Inch Travel Size: Spacious enough to hold everyday gear while still compact enough to carry by hand or place inside a backpack, duffel bag, luggage, locker, stroller bag, or travel tote.
  • Versatile Storage for Gym, Swim and Travel: Made for multiple use cases, including gym clothes, swimsuits, wet towels, shoes, toiletries, baby items, hiking gear, camping supplies, beach essentials, and organized packing for trips.
  • Convenient Hooks and Carry Handle: Features anti-rust hooks and a practical travel handle for easy carrying, hanging, and storage at the gym, pool, bathroom, campsite, locker room, hotel room, or laundry area.
  • Premium Everyday Organization Bag: Designed for customers who want a durable, reusable, and dependable wet bag instead of a basic disposable storage option, offering a cleaner way to organize wet, dirty, or odor-prone essentials.

all_reviews.reviewText:
This bag feel like quality from the moment you open the packaging.  The jet black color is consistent and inviting.  The HevraCom name stitching is a nice touch.  The metal zipper and the metal rings on both sides scream quality.  The zipper is heavy duty so it won't break when trying to stuff items into the bag.  The inside is fully lined with waterproof material.  

Overall, the bag is as advertised.  I look forward to a summer of travel without having to worry about what to do about wet clothes or shoes for once.   

Bag is recommended.
all_reviews.reviewTitle: No More Worrying About Wet Clothes
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText:
Waterproof travel laundry bag
If you travel, hit the gym, or just like staying organized in that case, this is one of those low-key essentials that instantly upgrades your routine.
1. Sleek, Minimal Aesthetic : This doesn't look like a typical laundry bag. It blends seamlessly into your luggage. 
2. Waterproof   Odor-Proof : This is the standout feature. The inner lining is designed to trap moisture and smells, which is exactly what you want when packing sweaty gym clothes or wet swimwear.  
3. This  bag has a solid medium-large capacity with handle which is ideal for 1. Weekend trips 2. Gym clothes  3. Shoes 
4. Premium Quality - It has Strong structure, Durable fabric %26 High-quality zipper. 
5. Uses: Travel: Separate dirty clothes in your suitcase  Gym: Keep sweaty gear contained. Beach: Store wet swimsuits 
Shoes: Protect clean clothes from dirt. 
It's very useful %26 will be used a lot %26 will last for a while.
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText: I am very impressed with this bag so far. The other couple of wet bags I have tried so far all helped, but they also all had a little bit of dampness seep through at the seams or corners. I've been putting a still dripping swim suit in here and today I had it sitting on my car seat for about an hour, and there wasn't a single wet spot. At most, the corners of the bag had that little bit of coolness that says there's something wet in it. Nothing outside the bag was even the tiniest bit damp. I haven't had it for too long, so we'll see how it holds up over time, but so far I'm impressed.
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText:
I actually put water in the bag.
I didn't leave it very long, but wanted to know it would hold wet garments. It's smaller than I thought it would be, but it is the same as the measurements listed. 
It dried quickly also. Plan to use it on my cruise in May.
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText: This little bag is just right for a trip to the beach or to a swimming pool. Have you get out of your wet clothes throw them in the back and you're good until you get home to wash them. Don't have to worry about getting the wet clothes you mixed up with the dry and clean stuff. Love this little bag. I highly recommend if you travel as much as I do.
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText: What a pleasant surprise.  This was much bigger than I was expecting.  Nice rugged feel on the inside and nice insulation on the inside.  Heavy duty zipper and good strap, for sure.  It will hold far more than I was expecting.   You know how you think you don't have enough room in these kinds of insulated items?  Well, not this one.   No sir, not this one.
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText:
This is by far the best wet bag I have ever owned or seen. It feels durable and well designed, and it works perfectly for my primary use, which is travel.

It handles wet clothes, swimsuits, and workout gear without leaking or creating odors. The outside has a water-resistant finish like a typical wet bag, but the inner layer is a rubbery, dry-bag-style lining, which adds extra protection and confidence when storing damp items.

It does not have a side or a top pocket, but that hasn't been an issue. It folds down easily and can be placed into top or side pockets of other bags when needed.

The strap is more of a side carry handle rather than a shoulder strap, but it works well for carrying. The zipper is a heavy-duty metal zipper that feels high quality and secure. Because it has a zipper, it is not ideal for full submersion, but it can function as a dry bag in a pinch for light moisture.

Overall, I love this bag and expect it to last for years of regular use.
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText: You might ask how impressive can a waterproof dirty clothes bag be. But you would be surprised it is well-made fits my application perfectly for wet clothes after paddling and not getting the rest of my vehicle wet. As an industrial grade zipper on the top and it's large enough for three or four changes of clothes. There are multiple other uses in this works perfectly for mine.
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText: Great little bag for travel and wet clothes.  It keeps moisture and odors contained, works perfectly for swimsuits.  Feels durable and well made.  Super convenient to have in a suitcase or gym bag.
all_reviews.itemName: HevraCom Waterproof Laundry Bag Travel for Wet Clothes - Odor-Proof Waterproof Bag for Wet Swimsuit, Travel Laundry Bags for Dirty Clothes, Swimsuits & Workout Gear with Rust-Resistant Zipper & Hooks

all_reviews.reviewText: Great swim suit bag. Lots of room and has a shoulder strap.  The top pocket is convenient and I use it for swimming now but it could also use it for ski gear.
all_reviews.reviewTitle: Keep the wet from the dry so I don't worry when I

all_reviews.reviewText: Heavy Duty.  Went on vacation, put our wet swimwear in it.  was very roomy, no odors nor leaks
